policy.summary: Operational review log for external source checks. This file records source-search work even when a restaurant is not promoted to external_source_registry.json.
policy.promotionRule: Only reviewed sources with short evidence terms are promoted to external_source_registry.json and used by recommendations.
policy.rawTextPolicy: Do not store copied page text, review text, ratings, photos, SNS posts, or user names.
